title: Zoho Analytics Metadata API Connection Specification

client_id.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 client ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 client secret. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Zoho OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: Zoho Analytics Metadata API base URL override for tests or region-specific data centers (e.g. https://analyticsapi.zoho.eu/restapi/v2).

token_url.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

org_id.description: Optional Zoho Analytics organization ID; sent as the ZANALYTICS-ORGID header on every request when set.

workspace_id.description: Zoho Analytics workspace ID required by the folders/query_tables/datasources streams and the sync_datasource/refetch_view_data write actions, all of which are workspace-scoped paths in the real Metadata API (unlike the flat legacy-parity workspaces/views/tables streams). Reading/writing those without this set fails with an unresolved-config-key error naming workspace_id; every other stream/action does not require it.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
